testcase.name: Login — wrong credentials › wrong password shows error and form stays usable
Login — wrong credentials › nonexistent username shows error and stays on login page
Login — wrong credentials › empty username and password shows error
Login — navigation links › register link on login page navigates to /register
Registration — happy path flow › registers a new user, redirects to login, then logs in successfully
Registration — error edge cases › mismatched passwords show inline error and form stays on /register
Registration — error edge cases › invalid email format shows inline error and stays on /register
Registration — error edge cases › duplicate username shows conflict error from backend
Registration — error edge cases › password too short shows inline validation error
Registration — error edge cases › login link on register page navigates to /login
Logout flow — dashboard › logout button on dashboard clears session and redirects to home/login
Thread creation flow › navigates from forum index to new-thread form and creates a thread
Thread creation flow › title character counter updates as user types
Thread creation flow › submit button is disabled when title is empty
Thread title constraint flow › title over 200 chars — submit blocked or error shown
Thread reply flow › adds a reply and it appears in the replies section
Nested reply flow › nested reply appears inside parent reply after posting
Nested reply flow › reply toggle shows/hides the nested reply form
Vote flow › upvoting a reply increments its vote score
Vote flow › vote badge is positioned at the top-right of the reply header
Forum search flow › filters threads by search keyword
Forum filter and sort flow › changing sort from newest to popular triggers a different ordering
Forum delete thread flow › creates a thread then deletes it via API and verifies it is no longer accessible
Forum layout redesign — vote badge › upvote-button and vote-score are visible on a reply
Forum layout redesign — vote badge › vote badge is inside the reply header row (top-right position)
Forum layout redesign — vote badge › clicking upvote-button on a reply increments the vote-score
Forum layout redesign — reply header › reply-author-{id} shows the author username inline
Forum layout redesign — reply header › reply author row contains depth indicator text
Forum layout redesign — nesting left-border › nested reply (depth > 0) has left-border class applied
Forum layout redesign — nesting left-border › top-level reply does not have left-border class
Forum layout redesign — collapse toggle › collapse toggle button is visible on nested reply with children
Forum layout redesign — collapse toggle › reply-toggle-{id} button shows and hides the nested reply form
Forum layout redesign — collapse toggle › collapse toggle (–/+) collapses and expands child replies
Reply max depth constraint flow › reply toggle is absent at max nesting depth (depth 2 replies cannot be replied to)
Forum link visibility and navigation › forum link is visible on thread detail page for logged-in user
Forum link visibility and navigation › forum link text is 'Forum' on thread detail page
Forum link visibility and navigation › forum link is visible for anonymous users on thread detail page
Forum link visibility and navigation › clicking forum link navigates to /forum page
Close Thread button styling › close thread button is visible only for moderator role
Close Thread button styling › close thread button is visible for admin role
Close Thread button styling › close thread button is not visible for regular user role
Close Thread button styling › close thread button is not visible for anonymous user
Close Thread button styling › close thread button shows 'Close Thread' text for open thread
Close Thread button styling › close thread button shows 'Reopen Thread' text after closing
Close Thread button styling › close thread button remains visible with correct text after reopening
Close Thread button styling › close thread button text is readable after closing and reopening
Thread detail page integration › thread detail page loads and displays content correctly
Thread detail page integration › navigation bar shows forum link and profile link when logged in
Thread detail page integration › forum link and profile link are both accessible on thread detail
User Profile Page Flow › 1. Login to dashboard to profile navigation › logs in with valid credentials and navigates from dashboard to profile
User Profile Page Flow › 1. Login to dashboard to profile navigation › login page loads and rejects invalid credentials
User Profile Page Flow › 2. Profile display flow › profile page shows account info, edit form, and avatar after load
User Profile Page Flow › 2. Profile display flow › shows avatar placeholder when no avatar is set
User Profile Page Flow › 3. Edit profile flow › fills edit form, saves, sees success alert, and data persists after reload
User Profile Page Flow › 3b. Profile constraint error flows › displayName input enforces max 100 character limit via maxlength attribute
User Profile Page Flow › 3b. Profile constraint error flows › bio input enforces max 500 character limit via maxlength attribute
User Profile Page Flow › 3b. Profile constraint error flows › shows error alert when profile update API returns 500
User Profile Page Flow › 4. Avatar upload flow › uploading a valid image shows success alert and updates avatar preview
User Profile Page Flow › 4. Avatar upload flow › avatar > 5MB shows error — upload rejected
User Profile Page Flow › 4b. Avatar delete flow › delete avatar button removes the avatar and shows placeholder
User Profile Page Flow › 5. Logout flow › logout button visible on profile page and clicking it redirects to home/login
User Profile Page Flow › Error scenarios › shows error alert when profile API returns 404
RBAC — Moderator can close threads › moderator sees Close Thread button on thread detail
RBAC — Moderator can close threads › regular user does not see Close Thread button
RBAC — Moderator can close threads › moderator closes thread — CLOSED badge appears and reply form disappears
RBAC — Moderator can delete replies › moderator sees delete button on replies
RBAC — Moderator can delete replies › regular user does not see delete button on replies
RBAC — Closed thread shows error for reply attempt › closed thread shows CLOSED badge
RBAC — Closed thread shows error for reply attempt › closed thread shows closed message and no reply form for logged-in user
Full user journey: register → login → forum → create thread → reply → vote › end-to-end journey completes without errors
Forum navigation from dashboard › forum link in dashboard nav goes to /forum and shows thread list
Forum category filter flow › clicking a category filter shows only threads for that category
Thread voting flow › upvoting a thread increments its score
Thread voting flow › downvoting a thread decrements its score
Thread voting flow › upvoting then downvoting returns score to original
Profile update journey › login → navigate to profile via dashboard → update profile → verify persisted
Forum thread detail — public access › thread detail page is accessible without login
Forum thread detail — public access › forum index loads without authentication and shows thread list
Forum search to detail flow › search finds thread → clicking title navigates to detail page
Reply content constraint flow › reply content over 2000 chars shows error on submit attempt
Reply content constraint flow › reply content counter shows character count
